question: Find the name and internet web of the channel that is directed by the most directors.
sql: SELECT c.Name, c.Internet FROM channel c JOIN (SELECT Channel_ID FROM director_admin GROUP BY Channel_ID ORDER BY COUNT(Director_ID) DESC LIMIT 1) sub ON c.Channel_ID = sub.Channel_ID

back_translation.intent: 查找与最多导演关联的频道名称和互联网信息

semantic.reason: 语义完全一致。原始问题要求找到由最多导演关联的频道名称和互联网信息，SQL描述通过COUNT(Director_ID)和GROUP BY Channel_ID实现该统计逻辑，并通过ORDER BY COUNT DESC和LIMIT 1获取最大值对应的频道信息。
